name: Operator Fusion Patterns
trigger: Multi-operator pattern (L2 problems): Conv+ReLU+BiasAdd, GEMM+Scale+Activation, etc.
approach: Fuse adjacent operators to eliminate intermediate memory round-trips. Strategy: (1) Identify which ops share data — those should fuse first. (2) Start with the easiest pair (e.g., activation + bias). (3) Measure after each fusion step. (4) For GEMM-based fusions, fuse post-GEMM ops into the GEMM epilogue. For Conv-based fusions, fuse activation + bias into the conv output loop. Exploration: try all 2^n fusion topologies for n operators, prune based on memory access analysis.
